name: Variables, Data Types & Equality
description: Kiểu dữ liệu thô/tham chiếu, let/const/var, ép kiểu ngầm định Coercion, so sánh == và ===.

name: Functions, Lexical Scope & Closures
description: Hàm bậc cao, Closure, phạm vi Lexical Scope, arrow functions, từ khóa this, call/apply/bind.

name: Objects, Prototypes & Inheritance
description: Object literals, Prototype chain, kế thừa mẫu prototype, cú pháp Class ES6.

name: Asynchronous Programming & Event Loop
description: Mô hình bất đồng bộ, Event Loop, Call Stack, Microtask/Macrotask Queue, Promises, async/await.

name: Modern ECMAScript Standards & Modules
description: Cú pháp ES6+, Destructuring, Spread/Rest, Template Literals, ES Modules (import/export).

name: Browser DOM Manipulation & Events
description: Thao tác cây DOM, querySelector, lắng nghe sự kiện, Event Delegation, Bubbling & Capturing.

name: Exception Handling & Browser Inspector Debugging
description: Xử lý ngoại lệ try-catch-finally, Custom Errors, Console API, điểm dừng breakpoint Browser Inspector.
